steps.title: Identify the emotional quality through 'resonance'
steps.content:
The final sentence reveals that the paintings have "resonance"—a word indicating emotional impact or deep connection.

This is the key clue: the blank must describe a quality related to emotional power, something that emerges from viewing ancient art and feeling connected to its creators.

steps.title: Choose the word expressing emotional impact
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean emotionally moving — the passage says the paintings have "resonance" precisely because of the shared humanity felt across 17,000 years. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ingenious: means cleverly inventive — describes intellectual creativity, not emotional impact felt by the viewer. ✗
  • Choice B — meticulous: means extremely precise or detailed — describes technical execution, not the emotional power that comes from connection across time. ✗
  • Choice C — pristine: means perfectly preserved or pure — describes physical condition of the paintings, not their emotional effect on viewers. ✗
  • Choice D — affecting: means emotionally moving or touching — directly captures the resonance and connection the passage attributes to the paintings' age. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
